resources.string: Please scan QR Code to bind
All keep records will be removed.
All history records will be removed.

Welcome to this application!

Before using this application, please read and understand the following statements carefully:

1. This application is a video aggregation search tool. All content comes from publicly available third-party sites on the Internet. This application does not store, produce, or upload any video content.

2. This application only provides technical search services and is not responsible for the legality, accuracy, completeness, or quality of any third-party content. Users should make their own judgments and bear the risks of use.

3. All content in this application points to third-party sources, and the copyright belongs to the original authors or rights holders. If you believe that certain content infringes upon your legitimate rights, please contact the relevant content provider directly for removal.

4. Users must comply with relevant laws and regulations when using this application. You may not use this application to access, distribute, or download any illegal, non-compliant, or infringing content. Legal liabilities arising from personal user actions shall be borne by the user.

5. Due to changes in third-party sites, technical issues, network failures, or requests from rights holders, some functions may become abnormal or unavailable. We sincerely apologize for this and will do our best to improve.

6. This disclaimer may be updated from time to time, and the updated statement will take effect once published. Please check regularly to stay informed of the latest terms.

Continuing to use this application means that you have read, understood, and agreed to accept all the contents of this disclaimer. If you do not agree, please stop using and uninstall this application immediately.
